ICLR.notes: Round 3 added LongPPL + HELMET + LongProc hits from ICLR 2025

EMNLP.notes: KV-Compression-Benchmark (2024 findings), Song-Precise (2024 main), XQuant (2025 main), TokenPrecision-Tradeoff (2025 findings), DynamicKV (2025 findings)

NAACL.notes: Chen Non-Determinism long papers, LRQ long papers

COLING.notes: AsymKV main conference (venue confirmation for Round 2 arXiv entry)

NeurIPS_Workshop.notes: Round 3 added NeurIPS 2025 LLM Evals Workshop (Beyond-Singular)

round_summaries.round_2: Round 2 Phase 1 literature scout (2026-04-08): 24 papers on KV cache quant novelty defense. C5 (inv_tau x GQA) intact. 8 new SHOULD_ADD_TO_CH2 candidates.
round_summaries.round_3: Round 3 Phase 1 literature scout (2026-04-09): 24 new papers focused on ch4 experimental methodology. Venue rotation: EMNLP, NAACL, TACL, COLING, SIGMOD, NeurIPS D&B. 1 CONTRADICTS (LongPPL ICLR 2025) + 7 SHOULD_ADD_TO_CH4. Key findings: ch4 Bootstrap+sign-flip+BH-FDR stat rigor is in top 16% of 445-benchmark Burden-et-al review; PPL-for-long-context critique needs hedge; PPL-determinism claim needs within-hardware scope.
